rulings.Case Title: BINGSEN LI VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 27, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF BINGSEN LI Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff In Interest And Granting Leave To File A Supplemental Complaint DENIED without prejudice. Moving party failed to establish by law and fact that Shur Wang is Plaintiff's successor in interest within the meaning of CCP 377.11. Moving papers fail to address Cal. Probate Code 4152(a)(4). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LIZA SWIFT VS. LARRY SWIFT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 27, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT Notice Lof Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Paintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift taken off calendar until such time that a Probate Court determines whether the Property at issue in this action (2727 Balboa), is an asset of the Trust. If it is determined that the Property is an asset of the Trust, a trustee may take appropriate steps to proceed in this action as a successor owner to the original Plaintiff. If it is determined that the Property was not in the Trust at the time of the decedent's death, after taking any necessary steps, a personal representative of the estate of individual decedent's successor in interest may renew this motion. In light of the facts of this case a determination by a Probate Court is necessary regarding this asset. This Court will not be making such determination. =(501/REQ)
